# Gatemini

> Rust MCP gateway (v1.7.1) exposing a discovery surface over backend MCP servers via a shared daemon

## Docs

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project structure, module map, runtime summary
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Daemon/proxy lifecycle, session identity, dedicated pools
- [Backend Management](docs/backend-management.md): Transports (stdio, HTTP, CLI adapter), dedicated pools, health checker
- [Tool Discovery](docs/tool-discovery.md): Three-tier search (BM25 → trigram → fuzzy), IDF distinctive terms
- [Sandbox](docs/sandbox.md): V8 execution, direct call parser, intent filtering, output pipeline
- [Token Efficiency](docs/token-efficiency.md): Smart truncation, auto-chunking, intent filtering, response metadata
- [Secrets & Config](docs/secrets-and-config.md): YAML config, env vars, BWS integration, hot-reload
- [Resources & Prompts](docs/resources-and-prompts.md): MCP resources and guided prompts
- [Codebase Map](docs/codebase-map.md): Module-by-module source guide

## Dynamic Resources

- `@gatemini://overview`: Gateway guide with live tool/backend counts
- `@gatemini://tools`: Compact tool index (~3k tokens)
- `@gatemini://backends`: Backend health and tool counts
- `@gatemini://llms`: Machine-readable tool reference (auto-generated)
- `@gatemini://llms-full`: Complete tool schemas (auto-generated)
- `@gatemini://stats`: Session context savings statistics (bytes returned/processed, savings ratio)
- `@gatemini://health`: Per-backend PID, RSS, peak RSS, memory limit, and recent stderr
- `@gatemini://recent`: Recent tool calls with timing
- `@gatemini://call_tool_chain`: Execution contract and examples
- `@gatemini://tool/{name}`: Full schema for one tool
- `@gatemini://backend/{name}`: Backend details + tool list
- `@gatemini://backend/{name}/tools`: All tools for a backend
- `@gatemini://recent/{limit}`: Recent calls with custom limit
- `@gatemini://guide/{topic}`: Focused guidance (call_tool_chain, discovery)

## API

- 7 meta-tools: search_tools, tool_info, list_tools_meta, call_tool_chain, register_manual, deregister_manual, get_required_keys_for_tool
- Prompts: discover, find_tool, backend_status
- Search: three-tier fallback (BM25 → trigram → fuzzy Levenshtein), IDF try_also terms
- Output pipeline: intent filter → auto-chunk JSON → smart truncate (60/40 head/tail) → size metadata
- Config: OutputConfig (auto_chunk_json, smart_truncation, chunk_threshold)

## Key Features (v1.3–v1.9)

- Per-session dedicated backend instances with autoscaling pool (instance_mode: dedicated)
- Three-tier tool search with typo correction
- Smart output truncation preserving head 60% + tail 40%
- Auto-chunking large JSON into key-path summaries
- Uniform array collapse for loop results
- Intent-driven output filtering
- Session byte tracking with context savings stats
- Expanded direct call parser (bypasses V8 for simple calls)
- 5 actionable sandbox error hints (shadowing, misspelled, unavailable, meta-tool, bare name)
- globalThis backend mirrors
- rmcp 1.2.0 + reqwest 0.13 with rustls crypto provider
- Configurable shutdown grace period (SIGTERM → poll → SIGKILL)
- Backend stderr capture in 200-line ring buffer
- Per-backend RSS memory tracking with auto-restart on limit
- Orphaned proxy detection (auto-exit when parent dies)
- Socket cleanup guard (Drop-based, panic-safe)
